description: Pattern Objective: 2 points for each diagonal set of three RED cards from bottom left to top right
Pattern Objective: 2 points for each diagonal set of three GREEN cards from top left to bottom right
Pattern Objective: 2 points for each diagonal set of three BLUE cards from bottom left to top right
Pattern Objective: 2 points for each diagonal set of three PURPLE cards from top left to bottom right
Pattern Objective: 3 points for each set of 2 RED cards one above the other and a GREEN card at the bottom right corner of the bottom RED card
Pattern Objective: 3 points for each set of 2 GREEN cards one above the other and a PURPLE card at the bottom left corner of the bottom GREEN card
Pattern Objective: 3 points for each set of 2 BLUE cards one above the other and a RED card at the top right corner of the top BLUE card
Pattern Objective: 3 points for each set of 2 PURPLE cards one above the other and a BLUE card at the top left corner of the top PURPLE card
Resource Objective: 2 points for each set of 3 FUNGI visible on your final playing area
Resource Objective: 2 points for each set of 3 PLANTS visible on your final playing area
Resource Objective: 2 points for each set of 3 ANIMALS visible on your final playing area
Resource Objective: 2 points for each set of 3 INSECTS visible on your final playing area
Resource Objective: 3 points for each set of a MANUSCRIPT, a INKWELL and a QUILL visible on your final playing area
Resource Objective: 2 points for each set of 2 MANUSCRIPTS visible on your final playing area
Resource Objective: 2 points for each set of 2 INKWELLS visible on your final playing area
Resource Objective: 2 points for each set of 2 QUILLS visible on your final playing area
